transcript: Chipotle? Y'all just get the burrito bowl, double steak, light on the rice, all the veggies, and a Coke Zero. Alright, how about Subway? Y'all just get the six-inch club on the multigrain wheat, all the veggies, light mayo, mustard, and a Diet Coke. Bro, how do you always know what to order? Bro, the MenuFit app tells me what to order. Comment menu, and I'll send you a link right now. Man, send me the link right now.
caption:
@menufit.app Comment "Menu" & I'll send you the link so you can Eat Out, and stay Fit

Steal these two fast food swaps

Chipotle Fit order:
Burrito Bowl > Double Steak > Light Brown Rice > Fajita Veggies > Fresh Tomato Salsa > Tomatillo-Green Chili Salsa > Romaine Lettuce > Diet Coke
525 calories 46 G protein

Subway fit order:
6-inch Subway Club (Hearty Multigrain bread, turkey, ham, roast beef, provolone, lettuce, tomatoes, red onions, light mayo) > Diet Pepsi
460 calories 29 G protein

Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps
ocr_text: CHIPOTLE 1,900 calories 63g protein 525 calories 46g protein | SUBWAY 1,540 calories 54g protein 460 calories 29g protein | Comment "Menu" I'll send you the link
visual_scenes: Two men stand side-by-side holding Chipotle meals, displaying calorie and protein information on a split-screen comparison. Scene transitions to Subway with updated calorie/protein metrics. MenuFit app shown on phone screen. CTA: Comment 'Menu' for link.
creator: @sethgolie

parsed.original_meal: Burrito bowl with queso, guac, regular toppings + Coke
parsed.swap_meal: Burrito Bowl, Double Steak, Light Brown Rice, Fajita Veggies, Fresh Tomato Salsa, Tomatillo-Green Chili Salsa, Romaine Lettuce, Diet Coke
parsed.notes: Also includes a Subway swap: 6-inch Subway Club on multigrain wheat, all veggies, light mayo, mustard, Diet Pepsi = 460 cal 29g protein. Two restaurants in one reel.
